title: GLP-1 Medications and Hair Loss: A Prevention Guide for Women Over 40
author: Happy Aging Team
meta_description: Hair loss on GLP-1 medications like Ozempic is common but preventable. Learn the 6-step protocol for women over 40 to protect hair during semaglutide treatment.
